authSign.subtitle: Use Apple or Google for the quickest access to Paragify, or continue with email.
authSign.activationNotice: We’ve sent an activation email. Please check your inbox to activate your account, then sign in again.
authSign.resendEmailMissing: Enter your email above before resending.
authSign.resendHint: You can resend once every 30 minutes.
authSign.registerNote: New Paragify email registrations require activation. We will send you a link to verify your email before your first sign-in.
authSign.resetSent: If the email exists, a reset link has been sent.
authSign.legalPrefix: By continuing, you agree to our
authSign.footerNote: We never post anything on your behalf in Paragify.
authSign.challengeDesc: Please complete the verification to continue registration.
authSign.errorAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Please sign in instead.
authSign.errorActivation: Activation required. Check your email for the activation link.
authSign.errorCaptcha: Security check failed. Please enter the correct value.
authSign.errorUnavailable: Sign-in is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

authReset.title: Set a new password
authReset.introGeneric: Choose a new password for your account.
authReset.invalidLinkBody: This reset link is not valid. Please request a new one from the sign-in page.
authReset.successBody: Password updated. You can now sign in.
authReset.resetFailed: Reset failed. Please request a new link.
authReset.networkError: We couldn’t reach the server. Please try again.

authActivate.errorHint: If the link has expired, request a new activation email from the sign-in page.
authActivate.idleHint: This usually takes a moment. You can keep this tab open.
authActivate.invalid: This activation link is not valid. Please request a new one.
authActivate.successBody: Your email is verified. You can now sign in.
authActivate.failed: We couldn’t activate this account. Please request a new link.
authActivate.networkError: We couldn’t reach the server. Please try again.
